metadata.description: The Microsoft Sentinel workspace into which the function will be deployed. Has to be in the selected Resource Group.
The region of the selected workspace. The default value will use the Region selection above.

properties.displayName: Audit Event ASIM parser for Azure Key Vault
properties.query:
let KeyVaultOperationLookup = datatable (OperationName:string, EventType:string)
[
  "VaultGet", "Read",
  "VaultPut", "Set",
  "VaultDelete", "Delete",
  "VaultPatch", "Set",
  "VaultList", "Read",
  "SecretGet", "Read",
  "SecretSet", "Set",
  "SecretDelete", "Delete",
  "SecretList", "Read",
  "SecretPurge", "Delete",
  "SecretBackup", "Read",
  "SecretRestore", "Set",
  "SecretRecover", "Set",
  "KeyGet", "Read",
  "KeyCreate", "Create",
  "KeyDelete", "Delete",
  "KeyList", "Read",
  "KeyUpdate", "Set",
  "KeyPurge", "Delete",
  "KeyBackup", "Read",
  "KeyRestore", "Set",
  "KeyRecover", "Set",
  "KeySign", "Execute",
  "KeyVerify", "Execute",
  "KeyWrap", "Execute",
  "KeyUnwrap", "Execute",
  "KeyEncrypt", "Execute",
  "KeyDecrypt", "Execute",
  "CertificateGet", "Read",
  "CertificateCreate", "Create",
  "CertificateDelete", "Delete",
  "CertificateList", "Read",
  "CertificateUpdate", "Set",
  "CertificatePurge", "Delete",
  "CertificateRecover", "Set",
  "CertificateImport", "Create",
  "Authentication", "Execute",
  "BackupCreate", "Create",
  "BackupStatus", "Read",
  "ListNetworkSecurityPerimeterConfiguration", "Read",
  "ListPrivateEndpointConnections", "Read",
  "AccessPolicyMerge", "Set"
];
let AzDiagnostics = (disabled: bool = false){
  AzureDiagnostics
  | where not(disabled)
  | where ResourceType == "VAULTS"
  | where Category == "AuditEvent"  
  | extend HttpStatusCode = toint(httpStatusCode_d)
  | extend
      ActorUsername = identity_claim_http_schemas_xmlsoap_org_ws_2005_05_identity_claims_upn_s,
      ActorUsernameType = iff(isnotempty(identity_claim_http_schemas_xmlsoap_org_ws_2005_05_identity_claims_upn_s), "UPN", ""),
      ActorUserId = tostring(identity_claim_http_schemas_microsoft_com_identity_claims_objectidentifier_g),
      ActorUserIdType = case(
          isnotempty(identity_claim_http_schemas_microsoft_com_identity_claims_objectidentifier_g), "AADID",
          isnotempty(identity_claim_appid_g), "AADID",
          ""
      )
  | extend Object = coalesce(id_s, requestUri_s, OperationName)
};
let ResourceSpecific = (disabled: bool = false){
  AZKVAuditLogs
  | where not(disabled)
  | extend Identity_claims = todynamic(Identity).claim
  | extend
      ActorUsername = tostring(Identity_claims["http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2005/05/identity/claims/upn"]),
      ActorUsernameType = iff(isnotempty(tostring(Identity_claims["http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2005/05/identity/claims/upn"])), "UPN", ""),
      ActorUserId = tostring(Identity_claims["http://schemas.microsoft.com/identity/claims/objectidentifier"]),
      ActorUserIdType = case(
          isnotempty(tostring(Identity_claims["http://schemas.microsoft.com/identity/claims/objectidentifier"])), "AADID",
          isnotempty(tostring(Identity_claims.appid)), "AADID",
          ""
      )
  | extend Object = coalesce(Id, RequestUri, OperationName)
  | project-rename CallerIPAddress = CallerIpAddress
};
let Combined = (disabled: bool = false) {
  union 
  AzDiagnostics(disabled=disabled), 
  ResourceSpecific(disabled=disabled)
  | lookup KeyVaultOperationLookup on OperationName
  | extend EventType = iff(isempty(EventType), "Other", EventType)
  | extend
      EventCount = int(1),
      EventStartTime = TimeGenerated,
      EventEndTime = TimeGenerated,
      EventProduct = "Azure Key Vault",
      EventVendor = "Microsoft",
      EventSchemaVersion = "0.1.2",
      EventSchema = "AuditEvent",
      TargetAppName = "Azure Key Vault",
      TargetAppType = "CSP",
      Operation = OperationName,
      ObjectType = "Cloud Resource"
  | project-rename
      SrcIpAddr = CallerIPAddress,
      EventOriginalUid = CorrelationId,
      DvcId = _ResourceId
  | extend
      DvcIdType = iff(isnotempty(DvcId), "AzureResourceID", "")
  | extend
      IpAddr = SrcIpAddr,
      User = ActorUsername,
      Application = TargetAppName,
      Dst = TargetAppName,
      Src = SrcIpAddr,
      Dvc = EventProduct,
      EventUid = _ItemId        
  | extend
    EventResult = case(
        HttpStatusCode between (200 .. 299), "Success",
        HttpStatusCode >= 400, "Failure",
        "NA"
    ),
    EventResultDetails = case(
        HttpStatusCode == 200, "",
        HttpStatusCode == 201, "Created",
        HttpStatusCode == 202, "Accepted",
        HttpStatusCode == 204, "No content",
        HttpStatusCode == 400, "Bad request",
        HttpStatusCode == 401, "Unauthorized",
        HttpStatusCode == 403, "Unauthorized",
        HttpStatusCode == 404, "Not found",
        HttpStatusCode == 409, "Conflict",
        HttpStatusCode == 429, "Throttled",
        HttpStatusCode >= 500, "Internal error",
        ""
    ),
    EventOriginalResultDetails = strcat("HTTP status code: ", tostring(HttpStatusCode), iff(ResultDescription != "", strcat(", ", ResultDescription), ""))    
  | extend EventSeverity = iff(EventResult == "Failure", "Low", "Informational")
  | project
      TimeGenerated,
      Type,
      EventCount,
      EventStartTime,
      EventEndTime,
      EventType,
      EventResult,
      EventResultDetails,
      EventOriginalResultDetails,
      EventSeverity,
      EventProduct,
      EventVendor,
      EventSchema,
      EventSchemaVersion,
      EventOriginalUid,
      Operation,
      Object,
      ObjectType,
      ActorUsername,
      ActorUsernameType,
      ActorUserIdType,
      ActorUserId,
      TargetAppName,
      TargetAppType,
      SrcIpAddr,
      DvcId,
      DvcIdType,
      IpAddr,
      User,
      Application,
      EventUid,
      Dst,
      Src,
      Dvc
};
Combined (disabled)
